documentation:

\- Prepare values for new assorment items;
\- Delete previous items.
\- Create new assortments items;

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_pricelist_assortment.tests.test_pricelist_assortment.TestPricelistAssortment.test_cron
documentation:
* Create a new pricelist
* Create a new pricelist assortment item
* Launch cron update
* New pricelist items should have been created
